Update this code base. To include a test suite for our new Cursor Composer tool. Ryan update to this current code base that will create a test suite for the new cursor compose tool that we just generated.

[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Update this code base to include a test suite for the new Cursor Composer tool that was just generated. Ensure comprehensive coverage for key functionalities: input parsing, multi-file edits, error handling, and performance benchmarks. The test suite should be modular, easy to run, and integrate seamlessly with the existing CI pipeline. Use a consistent testing framework that matches the current code base standards, and include clear documentation for how to run and interpret the tests."}}]
Update this code base. To include a test suite for our new Cursor Composer tool.

[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Update the code base to include a comprehensive test suite for the new Cursor Composer tool. Ensure the test suite covers key functionality, including: (1) input parsing, (2) multi-file edits, (3) error handling, and (4) integration with the existing code infrastructure. Use a consistent testing framework already in the project, or suggest one if none is defined. Include both unit tests and integration tests as appropriate. Document the test setup and provide clear instructions for running the tests."}}]
